hooks.command: python3 -c 'import json,re,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); s=json.dumps(d.get("tool_input",{})); ok=re.search(r"(__tests__|tests?|specs?)/|[._-](test|spec)",s,re.I); print(json.dumps({"systemMessage":"WIO test file changed. Before finalizing, run or identify the smallest relevant validation command and apply the value gate: KEEP, REDO, or REMOVE."})) if ok else None'
